puzzleDescription: Learn how to flip a string backwards by looping from the last character to the first using .charAt().
objective: Given the String 'word', print its characters in reverse order (e.g., 'Java' becomes 'avaJ').
hints: Use a for loop that starts at 'word.length() - 1'.
The loop should run as long as 'i >= 0'.
Use 'word.charAt(i)' to get the character at the current index.
Use System.out.print() instead of println() to keep the letters on the same line.
